mapper.select: SELECT id, category_id, title, content, keywords, tags, status, current_version, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM steering WHERE deleted = false AND status = 'active' AND to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(title,'') || ' ' || coalesce(content,'') || ' ' || coalesce(tags,'') || ' ' || coalesce(keywords,'')) @@ plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}) AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY ts_rank( to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(title,'') || ' ' || coalesce(content,'') || ' ' || coalesce(tags,'') || ' ' || coalesce(keywords,'')), plainto_tsquery('simple', #{query}) ) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.*, (1 - (s.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector)) AS similarity_score FROM steering s WHERE s.deleted = false AND s.status = 'active' AND s.embedding IS NOT NULL AND (1 - (s.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector)) > 0.3 AND s.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY s.embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE steering SET embedding = #{embedding}::vector WHERE id = #{steeringId}
UPDATE steering SET content_embedding = CAST(#{vecStr} AS vector) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, category_id, status, current_version, tags, keywords, author, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted, 1 - (content_embedding <=> CAST(#{vecStr} AS vector)) AS similarity_score FROM steering WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = false AND id != #{excludeId} AND content_embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY content_embedding <=> CAST(#{vecStr} AS vector) LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.content, s.category_id, s.status, s.current_version, s.tags, s.keywords, s.author, s.created_by, s.updated_by, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.deleted, 1 - (s.content_embedding <=> ref.content_embedding) AS similarity_score FROM steering s CROSS JOIN (SELECT content_embedding FROM steering WHERE id = #{specId}) ref WHERE s.status = 'active' AND s.deleted = false AND s.id != #{specId} AND s.content_embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.content_embedding <=> ref.content_embedding LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id FROM steering WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = false AND content_embedding IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM steering WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = false

SELECT id, category_id, title, content, keywords, tags, status, current_version, author, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM steering WHERE status = 'active' AND deleted = false AND content_embedding IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE steering SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, tags = #{tags}, keywords = #{keywords}, current_version = #{currentVersion}, status = 'active', embedding = #{embeddingStr}::vector, content_embedding = #{contentEmbeddingStr}::vector, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
